channel.title: VulnCheck — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by VulnCheck (vulncheck).

item.title: CVE-2026-50235 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 Reflected XSS via search Parameters
item.description: Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 contains a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in advanced search parameters that fail to properly sanitize user input before displaying it in search forms. Attackers can inject malicious scripts through unfiltered…

item.title: CVE-2026-50234 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 Path Traversal File Read
item.description: Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files by exploiting directory traversal in the web server context. Attackers can manipulate file path parameters to access sensi…

item.title: CVE-2026-50233 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 Arbitrary Directory Listing
item.description: Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 contains an arbitrary directory listing vulnerability in its readdirectory query, exposed through both the CLI service (TCP port 9090) and the HTTP JSON-RPC endpoint (/jsonrpc.js). The query accepts a folder parameter and li…

item.title: CVE-2026-50232 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 Stored XSS via Metadata Tags
item.description: Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts through media file metadata tags like GENRE, ARTIST, and ALBUM. Attackers can craft files with XSS payloads in metadata t…

item.title: CVE-2026-50231 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 Unauthenticated Stored XSS via server.log
item.description: Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 contains an unauthenticated stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the log viewer that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts by exploiting unescaped template variables. Attackers can inject XSS payloads through…

item.title: CVE-2026-50230 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 Reflected XSS via server.log
item.description: Lyrion Music Server 9.2.0 contains an unauthenticated reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in the server.log endpoint that allows attackers to inject arbitrary HTML and JavaScript code through the search parameter. Attackers can craft malicio…

item.title: CVE-2026-11322 · 7.1 HIGH — Hermes WebUI before 0.51.221 Path Traversal via Symlink Workspace Bypass
item.description: Hermes WebUI prior to v0.51.221 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows attackers to escape the workspace boundary by supplying symlinks that resolve to files or directories outside the designated workspace root. Attackers can exploit the…

item.title: CVE-2026-25551 · 8.5 HIGH — Seagull Software BarTender Deserialization Privilege Escalation via .NET Remoting Service
item.description: Seagull Software BarTender 2021 R1 through 12.0.1 contains an insecure deserialization vulnerability that allows low-privileged local users to escalate privileges. The DataServiceSingleton .NET Remoting endpoint is bound to localhost on TCP port 7375…

item.title: CVE-2026-25550 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Seagull Software BarTender Unauthenticated RCE via .NET Remoting Service
item.description: Seagull Software BarTender 2010, 2016, and 2019 contain an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability in the .NET Remoting service exposed on TCP port 7375 via BtSystem.Service.exe. The service registers an unauthenticated singleton endpoint…

item.title: CVE-2019-25745 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Plugin Google Review Slider 6.1 SQL Injection via tid
item.description: WordPress Plugin Google Review Slider 6.1 contains a time-based blind SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the 'tid' parameter. Attackers can send GET requests…

item.title: CVE-2019-25744 · 6.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Popup Builder 3.49 Persistent Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: WordPress Popup Builder 3.49 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by breaking out of option tags in the post_title parameter. Attackers can submit crafted POST reques…

item.title: CVE-2019-25743 · 6.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Soliloquy Lite 2.5.6 Persistent Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: WordPress Soliloquy Lite 2.5.6 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by inserting script tags in the post title field. Attackers can submit POST requests to the post e…

item.title: CVE-2019-25742 · 6.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Theme Zoner Real Estate 4.1.1 Persistent XSS
item.description: WordPress Theme Zoner Real Estate 4.1.1 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated agents to inject malicious scripts through the Address input field when creating properties. Attackers can inject JavaScript pa…

item.title: CVE-2019-25741 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mobatek MobaXterm 12.1 Buffer Overflow via Sessions File
item.description: Mobatek MobaXterm 12.1 contains a structured exception handling (SEH) based buffer overflow vulnerability in the username field of session files that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code. Attackers can craft a malicious MobaXterm session…

item.title: CVE-2019-25740 · 7.1 HIGH — Joomla com_jsjobs 1.2.6 Arbitrary File Deletion
item.description: Joomla com_jsjobs 1.2.6 contains an arbitrary file deletion vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to delete files by manipulating custom userfield parameters. Attackers can send POST requests to the job.savejob task with path traversal se…

item.title: CVE-2019-25739 · 6.4 MEDIUM — GigToDo Freelance Marketplace Script 1.3 Persistent XSS
item.description: GigToDo 1.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious JavaScript and HTML code through the proposal description field. Attackers can craft XSS payloads in the create_proposal endp…

item.title: CVE-2019-25738 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Hybrid Composer 1.4.6 Unauthenticated Settings Change
item.description: WordPress Hybrid Composer 1.4.6 contains an unauthenticated settings change vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to modify WordPress options by exploiting the hc_ajax_save_option action. Attackers can send POST requests to the admin-aj…

item.title: CVE-2019-25737 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Live Chat Unlimited 2.8.3 Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: Live Chat Unlimited 2.8.3 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts through the chat input field. Attackers can submit payloads containing script tags and event handlers tha…

item.title: CVE-2019-25736 · 8.6 HIGH — LabF nfsAxe 3.7 Ping Client Buffer Overflow
item.description: LabF nfsAxe 3.7 Ping Client contains a buffer overflow vulnerability that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by supplying a malicious payload in the Host IP field. Attackers can craft a specially formatted input file with shellcode and…

item.title: CVE-2019-25735 · 8.6 HIGH — AllPlayer 7.4 Local Buffer Overflow via SEH Unicode
item.description: AllPlayer 7.4 contains a local buffer overflow vulnerability in URL handling that allows attackers to overwrite structured exception handling pointers by supplying an excessively long URL string. Attackers can craft a malicious URL, paste it into the…

item.title: CVE-2019-25734 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Contact Form by WD 1.13.1 CSRF to Local File Inclusion
item.description: Contact Form by WD 1.13.1 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability combined with local file inclusion that allows unauthenticated attackers to include arbitrary files by exploiting unsanitized action parameters. Attackers can craft malicio…

item.title: CVE-2019-25733 · 8.6 HIGH — NetShareWatcher 1.5.8.0 SEH Buffer Overflow
item.description: NetShareWatcher 1.5.8.0 contains a structured exception handler buffer overflow vulnerability that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by supplying malicious input. Attackers can craft a payload with overwritten SEH and NSEH pointers thr…

item.title: CVE-2019-25732 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — PHP EI-Tube Script 3 SQL Injection via search parameter
item.description: PHP EI-Tube Script 3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the search parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the search endpoint with…

item.title: CVE-2019-25731 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Zuz Music 2.1 Persistent Cross-site Scripting via zuzconsole Contact
item.description: Zuz Music 2.1 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious JavaScript by submitting crafted contact form data. Attackers can inject script code through the name, subject, and messa…

item.title: CVE-2019-25730 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Listing Hub CMS 1.0 SQL Injection via pages.php id
item.description: Listing Hub CMS 1.0 contains a SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to pages.php with crafted id value…

item.title: CVE-2019-25729 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — PDF Signer 3.0 Server-Side Template Injection RCE via CSRF Cookie
item.description: PDF Signer 3.0 contains a server-side template injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code by injecting PHP commands through the CSRF-TOKEN cookie parameter. Attackers can craft malicious cookie values cont…

item.title: CVE-2019-25728 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Care2x 2.7 Hospital Information System SQL Injection via ck_config
item.description: Care2x 2.7 contains multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities that allow unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands by manipulating the ck_config cookie parameter. Attackers can inject malicious SQL through the ck_config cookie in multi…

item.title: CVE-2019-25727 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Plugin ad manager wd 1.0.11 Arbitrary File Download
item.description: WordPress Plugin ad manager wd 1.0.11 contains an arbitrary file download vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to download sensitive files by manipulating the path parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the edit.php endpoint wit…

item.title: CVE-2019-25726 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — All in One Video Downloader 1.2 SQL Injection via admin page-edit
item.description: All in One Video Downloader 1.2 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the id parameter. Attackers can send requests to the admin interface wi…

item.title: CVE-2019-25720 · 7.1 HIGH — Dräger SC Monitoring Devices DoS via Malformed Network Packet
item.description: Dräger SC Monitoring devices (SC 6002XL, SC 6802XL, SC 7000, SC 8000, SC 9000 XL) contain a denial-of-service vulnerability in all software versions that allows unauthenticated attackers to reboot the monitor by sending a malformed network packet. At…

item.title: CVE-2026-25861 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — QloApps 1.7.0 Weak Password Hashing via MD5 in Tools.php
item.description: QloApps through 1.7.0, fixed in commit 64e9722, contains a weak cryptographic algorithm vulnerability that allows attackers to compromise user credentials by exploiting the use of MD5 for password hashing in the Tools::encrypt() function within class…

item.title: CVE-2021-4481 · 8.3 HIGH — Dräger Protector Software Local Privilege Escalation via Insecure File Permissions
item.description: Dräger Protector Software prior to version 6.4.2 contains a local privilege escalation vulnerability due to insecure file system permissions that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges. Attackers can replace binarie…

item.title: CVE-2021-4480 · 8.3 HIGH — Dräger Protector Software Local Privilege Escalation via Insecure File Permissions
item.description: Dräger Protector Software prior to version 6.4.2 contains a local privilege escalation vulnerability due to insecure file system permissions that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges. Attackers can replace binarie…

item.title: CVE-2025-15653 · 7 HIGH — Dräger Zeus IE Anesthesia Workstation USB Interface Privilege Escalation
item.description: Dräger Zeus Infinity Empowered (Zeus IE) and Zeus RS C500 anesthesia workstations contain a local security vulnerability that allows unauthorized individuals with physical access to compromise software integrity via USB interface manipulation. Attack…

item.title: CVE-2024-14036 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Dräger Core 1.0.5 Denial of Service via Malformed SDC Message
item.description: Dräger Core 1.0.5 and Dräger M540 Converter Service 1.0.9 contain a denial of service vulnerability that allows network-adjacent attackers to trigger high CPU load by sending specially crafted, unencrypted SDC messages during the discovery process. A…

item.title: CVE-2022-4992 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Dräger Infinity M540 VG4.1.1 Spoofed Network Message Handling DoS/Tampering
item.description: Dräger Infinity Acute Care System and Standalone Infinity M540 patient monitors versions VG4.1.1, VG4.0.3, and lower (with VG4.2 partially affected) contain a network message handling vulnerability that allows remote attackers to inject spoofed or ta…

item.title: CVE-2026-49144 · 7.1 HIGH 👻 — BrowserStack Runner 0.9.5 Path Traversal via _default HTTP Handler
item.description: BrowserStack Runner through 0.9.5 contains a path traversal vulnerability in the _default HTTP handler in lib/server.js that allows unauthenticated network-adjacent attackers to read arbitrary files. Attackers can exploit the unauthenticated HTTP ser…

item.title: CVE-2026-49143 · 8.8 HIGH 👻 — BrowserStack Runner 0.9.5 Unauthenticated RCE via /_log HTTP Handler
item.description: BrowserStack Runner through 0.9.5 contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the /_log HTTP handler that allows unauthenticated network-adjacent attackers to execute arbitrary code by submitting crafted JSON request bodies to the handler, whic…

item.title: CVE-2021-4479 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Dräger Atlan A350 1.00-1.01 DoS via Medibus Interface
item.description: Dräger Atlan A350 software versions 1.00 through 1.01 contains an improper input handling vulnerability that allows attackers to cause a denial of service by sending specifically crafted non-Medibus-compliant data through the Medibus interface. Attac…

item.title: CVE-2021-4478 · 8.3 HIGH — Dräger CC-Vision Basic and CC-Vision E-Cal Out-of-Bounds Write via Malicious GDT File
item.description: Dräger CC-Vision Basic before 7.5.3 and Dräger CC-Vision E-Cal before 7.2.5.0 contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability when loading .gdt files. A crafted .gdt file can trigger a buffer overflow during file parsing, allowing an attacker to crash t…

item.title: CVE-2019-25724 · 7.1 HIGH — Dräger Infinity M300 VG2.x Network-Based Denial of Service
item.description: Dräger Infinity M300 patient worn monitors with software version VG2.x and earlier contain a network-based denial of service vulnerability that allows attackers with access to the hospital or Infinity Network to repeatedly trigger device reboots unti…

item.title: CVE-2019-25723 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Dräger Perseus A500 2.00-2.02 DoS via Medibus Interface
item.description: Dräger Perseus A500 software versions 2.00 through 2.02 contains an improper input handling vulnerability that allows external attackers to cause a denial of service by sending specifically crafted non-Medibus-compliant data through the Medibus inter…

item.title: CVE-2019-25722 · 7.6 HIGH — Dräger SC Monitoring Devices Hard-coded Credentials and DoS
item.description: Dräger SC Monitoring devices (SC 6002XL, SC 6802XL, SC 7000, SC 8000, SC 9000 XL) contain hard-coded plaintext credentials in source code and a denial-of-service vulnerability that allows local and remote attackers to compromise device integrity acro…

item.title: CVE-2026-49120 · 8.5 HIGH — Medplum < 5.1.14 SSRF via FHIR Subscription Endpoint
item.description: Medplum before 5.1.14 contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the subscription worker that allows authenticated users to perform unauthorized internal network requests by creating FHIR Subscription resources with arbitrary endpoint UR…

item.title: CVE-2019-25721 · 7.1 HIGH — Dräger Infinity M300 VG2.3.1 Network-Based Denial of Service
item.description: Dräger Infinity M300 patient worn monitors with software version VG2.3.1 and earlier contain a network-based denial of service vulnerability that allows network-adjacent attackers to repeatedly trigger device reboots by sending malicious requests ove…

item.title: CVE-2026-0611 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Spacelabs Healthcare Sentinel 10.5.x < 11.6.0 Unauthenticated RCE via .NET Remoting
item.description: Spacelabs Healthcare Sentinel versions 10.5.x and higher and 11.x.x before 11.6.0 contain an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability through a deprecated .NET Remoting HTTP channel exposed on port 8989 that allows attackers to perform arb…

item.title: CVE-2026-47117 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OpenMed < 1.5.2 Remote Code Execution via PII Model Loading
item.description: OpenMed before 1.5.2 contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the PII privacy-filter model loading path. The privacy-filter dispatcher used broad substring matching on the user-supplied model_name parameter, allowing a value such as attacker…

item.title: CVE-2019-25719 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Dräger Infinity M540 VG4.1.1 Spoofing and DoS via Network Message Handling
item.description: Dräger Infinity Acute Care System and Standalone Infinity M540 patient monitors running software versions VG4.1.1, VG4.0.3, and lower contain network message handling vulnerabilities that allow network-adjacent attackers to spoof or tamper with data…

item.title: CVE-2019-25717 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Dräger Infinity Delta/Kappa Patient Monitors Unauthenticated Log File Disclosure
item.description: Dräger Infinity Delta, Delta XL, and Kappa patient monitors contain an information disclosure vulnerability that allows unauthenticated network attackers to access log files over a network connection. Attackers can retrieve device internals, location…

item.title: CVE-2019-25718 · 8.6 HIGH — Dräger Infinity Explorer C700 Privilege Escalation via Kiosk Mode Bypass
item.description: Dräger Infinity Explorer C700 contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that allows attackers to break out of kiosk mode and access the underlying operating system through a specific dialog interaction. Attackers can exploit this kiosk escape to…
